frictionHotspots.title: Auto loan rate comparison drop-off
frictionHotspots.description: Members visiting rate comparison pages exit 3x more frequently than 4 weeks ago

frictionHotspots.title: 62% of mobile mortgage applicants stall at income verification
frictionHotspots.description: Document upload automation exception in UiPath workflow causing step 4 failures. 847 members affected this week.

frictionHotspots.title: 34% of new members don't complete account activation within 7 days
frictionHotspots.description: Activation emails have a 22% open rate. Members who don't activate within 14 days show 4x churn risk.

frictionHotspots.title: Members with fewer than 3 products show 2x churn risk
frictionHotspots.description: Single-product members are 2x more likely to churn within 12 months. Cross-sell engagement is declining.

frictionHotspots.title: Military retiree NPS has declined 13 points over 6 weeks
frictionHotspots.description: CD rate transparency complaints driving dissatisfaction among highest-tenure, highest-value members.
